3214210.name: Left to Rot - Infernal Rot
3214210.description: "Infernal Rot" - is a thorough digital lore book that goes into the intricate plot and character motivations of "Left to Rot." This substantial resource provides insights into Kate's experience while also providing light on Luca and the other victims in the story. "Infernal Rot" is intended for those who want to better understand the game's universe. It delves into the concepts and creative elements that define the world and its intricacies.
3214210.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
